title: To what extent are media freedom and pluralism challenged in EU countries?
subtitle: In 2024, media freedom was badly threatened in Hungary, followed by most countries in south-eastern Europe.
textNote: The general ranking represents each Member State’s overall risk score, calculated as the simple average of the risk scores across the four thematic areas of the MPM: Fundamental Protection, Market Plurality, Political Independence and Social Inclusiveness.
textSource: Centre for Media Pluralism and Media Freedom (2024)
